CustomField.description: Cru/FamilyLife Staff Classification for people serving in a Global Role.
CustomField.label: Global Staff Classification

value.fullName: CCC Staff - FamilyLife IS their primary responsibility
value.label: CCC Staff - FamilyLife IS their primary responsibility

value.fullName: CCC Staff - FamilyLife is NOT their primary responsibility
value.label: CCC Staff - FamilyLife is NOT their primary responsibility

value.fullName: CCC Staff - Other (e.g. Affiliate, Part Time Staff, etc.)
value.label: CCC Staff - Other (e.g. Affiliate, Part Time Staff, etc.)
